title: × anacampterorchis laniccae
intro: × Anacampterorchis laniccae, also known as the sterile hybrid of Anacamptis and Orchis, is a rare, hybrid plant species found in certain regions of Europe. While there isn't much information available on its medicinal properties, this plant is often associated with the general health benefits of its parent species, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the parent species include potential uses in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems. However, the preparation and usage of × anacampterorchis laniccae for medicinal purposes are not well established, and further research is needed to confirm its potential uses.
